title: Synthetic biology leads to recyclable textiles: Engineered protein fibers for a cleaner future
summary_en: Researchers develop engineered protein polymers that can be easily recycled and reused.
title_cn: 美国圣路易斯华盛顿大学研究人员依托合成生物学研发可循环利用纺织蛋白纤维

title: Mixed plastic waste target of upcycling process to cut waste, emissions
summary_en: Christopher Cooper tackles plastic upcycling with ARPA-E grant.
title_cn: 圣路易斯华盛顿大学研究人员研发混合塑料废弃物升级回收工艺以减少废弃物及排放

title: Boundaries of agricultural fields worldwide now publicly available
summary_en: Nathan Jacobs, collaborators launch model that could transform agriculture, food security.
title_cn: 全球首套10米分辨率农田边界数据集正式面向公众开放
